title: Hódmezővásárhely, Csongrád-Csanád — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Hódmezővásárhely, Csongrád-Csanád: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Hódmezővásárhely is a city in Csongrád-Csanád with a population of 41,500. A historic market town on the Great Plain, known for its agricultural heritage, the Tornyai János Museum, and the traditional Hungarian horse shows.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
